Class OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.web.OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport
Direct Known Subclasses:
OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolver, ReactiveOffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolver
public abstract class OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport extends Object
Base class providing methods for handler method argument resolvers to create OffsetScrollPosition instances from request parameters.
Since:
3.2
Author:
Yanming Zhou
See Also:
  • OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolver
  • ReactiveOffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolver

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected String
    getOffsetParameter(MethodParameter parameter)
    Returns the offset parameter to be looked up from the request.
    void
    setOffsetParameter(String offsetParameter)
    Configure the request parameter to lookup offset information from.
    void
    setQualifierDelimiter(@Nullable String qualifierDelimiter)
    Configures the delimiter used to separate the qualifier from the offset parameter.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport

      public OffsetScrollPositionHandlerMethodArgumentResolverSupport()

  • Method Details

    • setOffsetParameter

      public void setOffsetParameter(String offsetParameter)
      Configure the request parameter to lookup offset information from. Defaults to offset.
      Parameters:
      offsetParameter - must not be null or empty.

    • setQualifierDelimiter

      public void setQualifierDelimiter(@Nullable String qualifierDelimiter)
      Configures the delimiter used to separate the qualifier from the offset parameter. Defaults to _, so a qualified offset property would look like qualifier_offset.
      Parameters:
      qualifierDelimiter - the qualifier delimiter to be used or null to reset to the default.

    • getOffsetParameter

      protected String getOffsetParameter(MethodParameter parameter)
      Returns the offset parameter to be looked up from the request. Potentially applies qualifiers to it.
      Parameters:
      parameter - can be null.
      Returns:
      the offset parameter
